headline: Are You Looking for a Top Momentum Pick? Why Expeditors International (EXPD) is a Great Choice
summary: Does Expeditors International (EXPD) have what it takes to be a top stock pick for momentum investors? Let's find out.

headline: Expeditors International Of Washington (EXPD) Stock Trades Above Fair Value On A 61% Run
summary: After a strong 61.4% return over the past year, Expeditors International of Washington no longer looks obviously cheap. The Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate sits close to the current market price, while earnings-based multiples lean on the expensive side. Expeditors International of Washington's 61.4% one-year return has shifted the conversation from recovery to whether the current share price still leaves much room for upside. Recent commentary around rising freight rates...
